name: mcp-server-madeonsol
description: Solana KOL trading intelligence and deployer analytics. Real-time data from 950+ KOL wallets and 6,700+ Pump.fun deployers. Supports free API key, RapidAPI, or x402 micropayments.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_feed
tools.description: Get real-time Solana KOL trades from 950+ tracked wallets.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_coordination
tools.description: Get KOL convergence signals — tokens multiple KOLs are accumulating.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_leaderboard
tools.description: Get KOL performance rankings by PnL and win rate.

tools.name: madeonsol_deployer_alerts
tools.description: Get elite Pump.fun deployer alerts with KOL enrichment.

tools.name: madeonsol_discovery
tools.description: List all available endpoints with prices. Free, no auth required.

tools.name: madeonsol_create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook for real-time push notifications. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook by ID. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_test_webhook
tools.description: Send a test payload to verify a webhook. Pro/Ultra.

tools.name: madeonsol_stream_token
tools.description: Get a 24h WebSocket streaming token. Pro/Ultra.
